description: rag-plugin hooks. (1) PreToolUse Bash guardrail that warns before commands that would fight the Qdrant single-process file lock while the ragtools service is up. (2) UserPromptSubmit retrieval-reminder (v0.3.0, D-017) that injects a system reminder when the user's prompt has a likely match in the indexed knowledge base. (3) UserPromptSubmit project-focus injector (v0.9.0, D-025) that injects scope-this-to-project-X context when /project-focus is active. None of these hooks block or deny.
